overview.value: The Indian Space Research Organisation (ISRO) is the space agency of India. It is involved in science, engineering and technology to harvest the benefits of outer space for India and mankind. ISRO is a major constituent of the Department of Space (DOS), Government of India. The prime objective of ISRO/DOS is the development and application of space technology for various national needs.

focus.value: The space agency of India, involved in science, engineering and technology to harvest the benefits of outer space
